products.name: Orthopedic Memory Foam Pet Bed
products.shortDescription: Luxurious memory foam pet bed with removable, machine-washable cover
products.fullDescription: Luxurious memory foam pet bed with removable, machine-washable cover. Provides superior support for senior pets and those with joint issues. Water-resistant liner protects the foam core. Available in multiple sizes to fit all breeds.

products.name: Premium Dry Dog Food - Chicken & Rice
products.shortDescription: Complete nutrition dry dog food with real chicken as first ingredient
products.fullDescription: Premium dry dog food made with real chicken as the first ingredient. Formulated with whole grains, fruits, and vegetables for complete nutrition. No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives. Suitable for adult dogs of all breeds.
highlights: For adult dogs of all breeds

products.name: Interactive Rubber Ball Toy
products.shortDescription: Durable rubber ball for active play and fetch games
products.fullDescription: Durable rubber ball designed for active play and fetch games. Made from non-toxic, natural rubber that's safe for pets. Bounces unpredictably to keep your pet engaged. Suitable for medium to large dogs.

products.name: Stainless Steel Dog Bowl Set
products.shortDescription: Set of 2 stainless steel bowls with non-slip base
products.fullDescription: Premium stainless steel bowl set includes 2 bowls for food and water. Features non-slip rubber base to prevent sliding. Dishwasher safe and rust-resistant. Perfect for dogs of all sizes.

products.name: Cat Scratching Post with Condo
products.shortDescription: Multi-level scratching post with cozy condo and hanging toys
products.fullDescription: Multi-functional cat tree featuring scratching posts, cozy condo, and hanging toys. Covered in soft plush fabric with natural sisal scratching posts. Stable base prevents tipping. Perfect for multiple cats.

products.name: Chicken Jerky Dog Treats
products.shortDescription: All-natural chicken jerky treats for training and rewards
products.fullDescription: All-natural chicken jerky treats made from 100% real chicken breast. Perfect for training and daily rewards. No grains, gluten, or artificial preservatives. Soft and chewy texture that dogs love.
